headline: Tesla's Board Is Desperately Trying To Focus Elon Musk's Attention On The Company
summary: The board of Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) is struggling to maintain CEO Elon Musk's total commitment while he manages multiple ventures.

headline: From Tokyo To New York, Stock Markets Are Hitting Unprecedented Highs: Report
summary: Stock markets worldwide are reaching record-breaking highs. This unprecedented rally, spanning from Tokyo to New York, has seen 14 of the world's 20 largest stock markets hit all-time highs.

headline: Tesla Bull Gary Black Says 'Likely' Approval Of Elon Musk's $56B Pay Package Is 'Next Major Catalyst' For The Company

summary: OpenAI's AI Safety team is facing a "mass exodus" after resignations of leaders of the superalignment team, Ilya Sutskever and Jan Leike.

headline: Tesla Makes Its 3 Millionth Car In California Despite Rising Inventory, Layoffs
